response.justification: Candidate brings 13+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with direct hands-on work in the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) at recent roles. Current role at re:cinq explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which directly matches the AI agent development requirement. Strong polyglot background (Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent) and demonstrated architecture/testing discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based) align well with the senior IC profile, though Nest.js and Kotlin are not explicitly listed.
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP framework experience at current role matches a key requirement
Deep full-stack expertise with TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB plus AWS CDK and Docker/Kubernetes exposure
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and public teaching/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience appears dated (pre-2018) and limited in scope
Vitest not explicitly called out, though general testing framework expertise is evident

key_factors.factor: Missing explicit Nest.js and current Kotlin
